title: Fix 3 verified issues in Astro academic homepage

stories.title: Extract hardcoded footer i18n into Footer.astro component
acceptanceCriteria: Footer strings (Built with/本网页由, Last updated/最后更新时间) are moved from BaseLayout.astro into src/content/homepage/en.json and zh.json
A new src/components/Footer.astro component exists and accepts lang + lastUpdated props
BaseLayout.astro imports and uses Footer.astro instead of the inline hardcoded footer
Footer renders correctly in both English and Chinese with dark mode support
npm run build passes with 0 errors

stories.title: Enable prefetch in astro.config.mjs
acceptanceCriteria: astro.config.mjs contains prefetch: true (or equivalent prefetch configuration)
npm run build passes with 0 errors
No runtime console errors related to prefetch

stories.title: Create bilingual 404.astro page
acceptanceCriteria: 404 page displays bilingual-appropriate messaging based on URL (/zh/ vs /)
Design matches the site's color scheme, typography, and dark mode
npm run build passes with 0 errors and the 404 page is present in dist/
